productDisplayName: Indigo Nation Men TR Yarn Dyed Beige Trousers
description: Composition Camel coloured full length semi-formal trousers made of 60% cotton and 40% polyester, has a flat front, two pockets with stud detailing on the sides, smaller patch pocket in the right pocket, two welt pockets on the back with thread and stud detailing, and metal zipper and button closure Fitting Slim Wash care Hand/machine wash in cold water with mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Drip dry in shade Warm iron Thursday dressing gets a powerful twist with these camel coloured semi-formal trousers from indigo nation. Made from the choicest of fabrics, they are perfectly fitted for your semi-formal Thursdays. These smart trousers don't just look great they are also comfortable enough to be worn all day long. Pair them with a semi-formal shirt to get a great Thursday look, and with a polo neck t-shirt for a day out with friends. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 41.5" Height-6.1", waist-31"
